title: French-Style Russian Beef Pilaf
description: A hearty French-inspired dish featuring tender beef, pilaf, and a hint of Russian spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef cubes and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the diced potatoes, pilaf mix, thyme, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
